## 2024-05-16 - XSS in HTML Report Generation
**Vulnerability:** Untrusted user input (filenames, matched code, vulnerability names) was embedded directly into HTML reports without sanitization in `src/scanner/reporter.py`, leading to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) risks.
**Learning:** HTML reports generated by scanning tools can be a vector for XSS if they include unsanitized code snippets or filenames from the scanned target.
**Prevention:** Always use `html.escape()` or a robust templating engine (like Jinja2 with autoescaping) to sanitize user-controlled data before rendering it in HTML.
